settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your PacePrecision experience
settings.restingHRHint: Measured in the morning upon waking

home.subtitle: Import your GPX trace and get a segment-by-segment simulation of your next race, compared across three strategies: Conservative, Target, Ambitious.
home.feature5: Weather conditions, nutrition and cutoff barriers
home.gpxAnalysisDesc: Import your GPX file — the engine automatically splits the course into segments, calculates grades, distances and elevation, and generates the 2D map, elevation profile and an interactive 3D view of the terrain.
home.dataImportDesc: Connect your Garmin account to automatically enrich your profile: VO2max, lactate threshold, resting HR and Firstbeat race predictions (5K, 10K, half, marathon).
home.simulationDesc: Each route is simulated across three strategies — Conservative, Target, Ambitious — with pace adjusted by grade (Minetti), progressive fatigue, estimated HR (Karvonen) and energy expenditure.
home.pdfExportDesc: Export your race plan as a PDF for offline reference on race day — strategies, paces, risk zones and nutrition in a single document.
home.visualization3dDesc: Visualize your route in 3D with relief exaggeration and interactive rotation. The 2D map and elevation profile accompany each analysis to help spot key sections.
home.runnerProfileDesc: Manually enter your weight and walking threshold, or sync Garmin Connect to automatically import VO2max, lactate threshold and Firstbeat predictions.
home.ctaReady: Ready to analyze your next race?
home.footerDesc: Analysis and simulation tool for trail running. Import your GPX, set up your profile, compare your race strategies.

planner.dropHint: Drag your GPX trace here to start analysis and generate your race plan.

comparativeTable.avgFatigueTooltip: Average speed loss caused by cumulative fatigue over the race (time on effort, distance, elevation gain and loss). 0% = fresh, 50% = exhausted. E.g. 20% ≈ you run ~20% slower than when fresh.

conditions.title: Race conditions
conditions.hint: Adjust the simulation to match the expected weather on race day.

profile.syncWithGarmin: Sync your Garmin account to see your physiological data.
profile.syncPhaseNoTrail: {{total}} activities found, no trail with enough elevation for analysis

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Sign in to save your data, sync your runner profile and retrieve your GPX files.
account.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your registration, then sign in.
account.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
account.localDataKept: Your local data will be kept.

garmin.title: Garmin Connect
garmin.disconnectedDesc: Raw data + Running Power + Cadence + HRM-Pro
garmin.securityNote: Your credentials are sent to your personal Vercel instance only. OAuth tokens are stored securely on your account.
garmin.mfaTitle: Enter the code already received by email
garmin.mfaDesc: Garmin sent you a code to {{email}} during the first attempt. Enter that same code — don't wait for a new one.

analysis.invertedYAxis: Inverted Y axis: a lower value = a faster pace
analysis.noStreamsData: Not enough GPS streams for the speed/grade curve

gpxImport.mustBeGpx: The file must be in .gpx format
